Off Calendar Apr-19-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance is made by any counsel, party, or interested person.

Noting no appearances, the Court takes the matter off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-12-2019 Continued To May-07-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Karly Peterson appeared by telephone for Victoria Caldwell.
John Stein for Sheree Jones (Objector).

Mr. Stein stated that they met and conferred multiple times, that the Petitioner suggested that she intends to amend her petition, that this has not happened yet and that he is not clear where this is going. Ms. Peterson stated that she filed a new trust petition (The Royal Irrevocable Trust PTR-19-302676) with a hearing date of May 1st, that she would like the current petition to move forward and that she is not including the will at this time. Mr. Stein stated that they have not talked about mediation and that he is not clear as to why he has not been served. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to May 7, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 after the hearing on the trust matter. The Court stated that maybe this will provide some clarity as what the Petitioner's strategy is.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Continued To Mar-12-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Continued To Jan-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Continued To Jan-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Continued To Nov-20-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Karly Peterson for Victoria Caldwell (Petitioner).
John Stein for and with Sheree Jones (Objector).

Mr. Stein stated that a substitution of attorney was filed late on Friday, that he does not see a lot going on here, that at this point they don't know of any assets that that require probate, that there is a Trust and that this is not the right mechanism. The Court noted that there is now a will, questions whether the will was lodged with the Court and stated that the Parties need to talk to each other. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to November 20, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-28-2018 Continued To Oct-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Karly Peterson for Petitioner.
Vincent Yu for Sheree Jones (Objecting Party).

The Court noted that we now have an objection which takes the position that no probate is necessary because the property is in Trust, and if probate is necessary, Ms. Jones is the named Executor. Ms. Peterson stated that she just received everything yesterday afternoon, that her Client filed her petition after inquiring with Ms. Jones if there were any estate plans and that she would like a little more time to review this. Mr. Yu stated that he was just retained, that his Client has the original will and that she will lodge it with the Court. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to October 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Parties are to confer to see if this is going anywhere and Ms. Jones is to decide if she will file a competing petition.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-31-2018 Continued To Aug-28-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sheree Jones (Decedent's Granddaughter) in Propria Persona.

This was a pregranted matter. Ms. Jones stated that she is here to object to the petition. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to August 28, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Jones is to file a written opposition or a competing petition by August 20, 2018 and serve it on the parties. The Court recommends Ms. Jones hire an attorney.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
